x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Eligibility Criteria Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The conditions that must be satisfied before a financial product is allowed to be rolled over.

Comment:
Examples
Loan payments must be up to date

Deposit must reach maturity

Customer account must remain active

No regulatory restrictions on renewal

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Type Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies the form of rollover allowed for the product.

Comment:
Example: A €10,000 deposit where €7,000 is rolled over and €3,000 withdrawn.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Duration Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines the length of the new period for which the product will continue after rollover.

Comment:
Example: A 12-month term deposit automatically renewed for another 12 months.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Interest Rate Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines how the interest rate is determined for the new rollover period.

Common rules include:
Original interest rate maintained
Current market rate applied
New negotiated rate
Tiered rate depending on amount

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Calculation Method Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: The rule that determines how interest or financial amounts are calculated during the rollover period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Fee and Charge Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines any fees, penalties, or service charges associated with performing a rollover.

Comment:
Examples:
Fixed rollover processing fee (€25)

Percentage fee (0.5% of principal)

No-fee rollover for premium customers

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Customer Consent Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies whether the customer must approve or confirm the rollover before it is executed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines the limit on how many times a product can be rolled over.

Comment:
Example:
Loan restructuring allowed only twice

Deposit can be renewed indefinitely

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Regulatory Restriction Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines compliance or regulatory limitations that affect rollover eligibility.

Comment:
Examples:
Central bank restrictions on loan restructuring
Anti-money-laundering checks before deposit renewal

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Notification Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines the obligation of the bank to notify the customer before rollover occurs.

Comment:
Examples:
Notification sent 7 days before maturity

Reminder through SMS or email
